title: hieracium × spathulifolium
intro: Hieracium × spathulifolium, also known as Spathulifolium hawk's beard or a hybrid of the hawkweed plant, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Hieracium × spathulifolium include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
